entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A versatile cereal crop and staple food known for its resilience to climate adversities

entities.name: CLIMATE ADVERSITIES
entities.description: Environmental stressors that affect crop growth and stability

entities.name: SORGHUM BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing superior sorghum varieties through various breeding strategies

entities.name: YIELD IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The goal of increasing the productivity of the crop

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to resist biological stressors such as pests and diseases

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to withstand non-living environmental stressors

entities.name: QUALITY ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The improvement of the nutritional or physical properties of the crop

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used in breeding that operate at the molecular level to identify and select traits

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach that utilizes genomic information to accelerate the development of superior varieties

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: Rapid and automated measurement of plant traits to understand genetic architecture

entities.name: ADVANCED GENOMICS
entities.description: Sophisticated techniques for analyzing the genome to understand complex traits

entities.name: GENETIC ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The underlying genetic basis and organization of a trait

entities.name: COMPLEX TRAITS
entities.description: Traits controlled by multiple genes and environmental factors

entities.name: PRECISION BREEDING
entities.description: A highly targeted breeding approach using advanced technologies like genome editing and AI

entities.name: CRISPR/CAS9 GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A precise tool for editing DNA sequences to introduce specific traits

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
entities.description: Computational systems used to analyze data and optimize breeding pipelines

entities.name: DIGITAL AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The integration of digital technology into farming and breeding processes

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient, affordable, and nutritious food

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: Farming practices that maintain productivity without compromising environmental health

entities.name: CHANGING CLIMATE
entities.description: The global shift in weather patterns that necessitates resilient crop varieties
